# Fixture: clayton_palmen_no_shifts_loop
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 24.0s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Partner: I did complete it
Concierge: You're all set — you can start picking up shifts now! Open the Shifts tab to see what's available.
Partner: Nothing pops up
Concierge: Quit the app fully and reopen it — that usually refreshes things. If it's still not showing, submit a support ticket in the app and the team can take a look.
Partner: For months it just keeps going

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
I'm sorry this has been dragging on for months. Email support@shiftsmart.com with your location — they can look into why shifts aren't showing and fix your account.
